title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Sanji, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Run away, jinbe!! You too, straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We wish you a safe voyage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A sail ship becomes vulnerable when flood- ed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The ship is becoming heavier and slower.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Patch the holes in the sails so they're able to catch the wind... work together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Escape at the Fastest Speed Possi- Ble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will still take a few hours for you to get out of big mom's territory....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're guarding our rear to help the ship escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've made it this far, but... if the flagship and fleet continue to chase us..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to make it out...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rear guard!! Please leave it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We'll wait for you at Wano!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even if you die, don't die!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
